subcodes.first_line: O My servants! My remembrance of you is indeed among My most exalted gifts, would that ye might perceive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبادی ذکری ایاکم هو من اعظم مواهبی لو انتم تشعرون
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
